rationale: The citing paper uses Lim, Ahearne, and Ham (2009) as a key empirical predecessor in sales contest design, explicitly stating that the prior study tested prize structures but did not examine contests with more winners than losers. That identified limitation is used to position the current paper's core contribution on high-winner contests and social loss aversion. The citing paper also notes that its experimental procedure is similar to Lim et al. (2009), indicating methodological carryover rather than a passing mention.
relation_description: The citing paper extends Lim, Ahearne, and Ham (2009) by taking their contest-design experimental stream into a new design region (higher winner proportion) and adding a social comparison/loss aversion mechanism to explain when that structure outperforms standard designs.
